headline: NEE vs. AEP: Which Power Utility Offers Stronger Investment Potential?
summary: NextEra Energy's higher ROE, stronger EPS growth outlook and larger $94 billion capex plan position it ahead of American Electric Power.

headline: BUI: Attractive Valuation And Growth Outlook (Rating Upgrade)
summary: BUI stands to benefit from accelerating AI data center-driven power demand, with 71% of assets in utilities and energy. Read why BUI CEF is upgraded to a Buy.
